profile: Informatics student at Université Côte d'Azur (Ranked 5th in cohort) currently completing an Erasmus exchange at Universidad Complutense de Madrid. Passionate about high-performance algorithms, system robustness, and automation. Experienced in building enterprise data-sync tools and research-grade ML scaffolds.

education.description: Active participant in the Facultad de Informática, focusing on advanced computing and international collaboration.
Ranked 5th in the cohort (previous academic year). Core coursework in algorithms, data structures, and software architecture.

highlights: Engineered a three-tier web service for high-volume data synchronization between DHL databases and client-side systems.
Automated file reconciliation workflows, significantly reducing manual error-handling for large-scale enterprise datasets.
Implemented custom error-reporting software to identify and resolve data discrepancies in real-time.
Instructed bachelor students in Mathematics and Informatics, translating complex algorithmic concepts into accessible lessons.
Managed academic projects and organized curriculum milestones for a diverse group of peers.

customSections.title: Robustness & Algorithmic Projects
customSections.content:
• HetGNN & Self-Healing Framework: Developed a PyTorch-based system to maintain GNN stability under structural 'shocks' using dual-ascent optimization.
  • RandLin Matrix Diagnostics: Built a matrix-free library to validate the reliability (calibration) of randomized linear algebra estimators.
  • DetGraph Change Detection: Created a CLI for detecting structural shifts in graphs using spectral statistics.

customSections.title: Systems & Tools
customSections.content:
• Cividussi Resume Generator: A print-optimized TypeScript/React app featuring real-time A4 overflow detection and AI tailoring.
  • Timonipumba Game Engine: A 2D engine built in Java using ECS architecture to decouple game data from logic.
